body.title: _gate_clear logic duplicated across 3 files — same multi-dep/substring bug, consolidate to one source
body.description:
Same drift pattern as T-status-label-source-consolidation, but for gate/dependency logic. _gate_clear is copied into lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (FIXED this session: all-terminal multi-dep + substring-safe via _GATE_ID_RE), lab/claudecode/queue_view.py:57 (inline copy, STILL has the first-match `t['id'] in gate_val` substring bug + only checks the first predecessor), and ~/bin/uuopentickets (inline copy, same bug, runs under system python3 so cannot import the package). They will drift exactly like the status labels did. Extract the gate-clear + id/date token logic to one canonical module the in-repo callers import; document the ~/bin divergence (can't import).

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (_gate_clear/_ungate_dependents/_GATE_ID_RE — canonical), lab/claudecode/queue_view.py (_gate_clear inline at ~57, repoint to import), ~/bin/uuopentickets (document divergence; back up before any edit — outside git).
**Design rules:** test-plan; docs-live-in-code.
**Scope boundary:** IN - one canonical gate module (or export cc_queue's functions) imported by queue_view; queue_view inherits the multi-dep + substring fix; test asserting queue_view and cc_queue agree on a 2-predecessor + substring case. OUT - editing ~/bin without backup (document divergence); changing the gate semantics themselves.
**Test plan:** a test importing both queue_view._gate_clear and cc_queue._gate_clear asserting identical verdicts on (multi-dep partial, multi-dep all-terminal, T-foo vs T-foo-bar substring, future date); existing gate-ordering tests stay green.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
[error] PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write): The skeleton must never depend on Postgres — skeleto — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-004 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-004: Flat-File Registry (Atomic Write))
…and 37 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Consolidated gate_clear to unseen_university/gate_logic.py (leaf module, same pattern as ticket_status.py). cc_queue.py + queue_view.py import the canonical gate_clear/GATE_ID_RE/GATE_DATE_RE/TERMINAL_STATUSES — verified same object identity in both. queue_view inherited the multi-dep all-terminal + substring-safe fix (was releasing on first id alone + substring-matching T-foo into T-foo-bar). 14 new tests in tests/test_gate_logic.py pin semantics + cross-caller agreement; 46 related tests green. ~/bin/uuopentickets divergence documented in module docstring, not edited (outside git). commit 32bdd54a.
